headline: Targa Resources: This Stock Has Performed Well, But It Still Has Potential Today
summary: Targa Resources is positioned for continued growth, leveraging its dominant Permian Basin midstream footprint and volume-driven business model. Read the latest analysis on the stock here.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Williams Companies, Raises Price Target to $83
summary: Jefferies  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   maintains Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $81 to $83.
